mathematics_background: Comfortable with basic statistics and reading plots, but not expecting heavy derivations.
machine_learning_background: Knows the basic idea of supervised learning, train/test splits, features, labels, and model evaluation.
deep_learning_background: Beginner. Has heard of LLMs and prompts, but has not studied model internals deeply.
python_background: Can read simple Python and notebook cells, but prefers code examples to be short and heavily explained.
tensor_familiarity: Low to moderate. Tensor shapes should be explained only when they are necessary for understanding.
